text: I walk through this pristine, modern space, glass reflecting my own image back at me, as if to question my presence here. The colors and the clear sense of purpose in the R+D exhibit evoke a feeling of curiosity mingled with humility. I sense the ongoing dance between humanity and technology, and feel both small and privileged to witness this tapestry of knowledge and ambition. The atmosphere is reflective, almost meditative—fostering a quiet awe at the efforts to understand and connect with intelligent machines.
